title: waiver-stamp config
description: Project config at .waiver-stamp.json (repo root); each key is a standing policy.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to the published JSON Schema.

allow.description: Glob allow-list for the change-docs op (§6.5).

deny.description: Glob deny-list; a hard veto over allow (§6.5).

allowBumping.description: The dependency-bump allow-list: scope prefixes or exact names (§6.3).

lockfileHonestyCheck.description: Name of the required check that proves the lockfile is honest (e.g. the lockfile-assay job/check name). When it is a required check, the "assumes the lockfile is honest" caveat is dropped from APPROVE reviews (spec §2.5).
